channel.title: Shopify Changelog
channel.description: Latest changes to the Shopify platform

item.title: productVariantsBulkUpdate input type changes in 2026-07
item.description: The variants argument now requires an explicit sku field.

item.title: GraphQL Admin API deprecation: Product.barcode field
item.description: The Product.barcode field is deprecated and will be removed in 2026-10.

item.title: New fulfillment tracking API
item.description: A new API for tracking fulfillment status is now available.

item.title: Webhook delivery improvements
item.description: Webhook delivery reliability has been improved with automatic retries.

item.title: OAuth scope requirements update for 2026-04
item.description: New scope requirements for accessing customer data starting 2026-04.
